items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a speed edge over Cody Gibson on the feet.
items.quote: I feel like striking wise, little bit of that speed edge over the Cody Gibson side.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a win over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam by violent knockout.
items.quote: he has a win over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam. And it wasn't just a win. It was a violent knockout.

items.claim: Cody Gibson can physically overwhelm people at 135 pounds because he is pretty big for the weight class at 5 foot 10 with a 71 inch reach.
items.quote: he's kind of a guy that can physically overwhelm people at 135 pounds because he's pretty big for the weight class. 5 foot 10, 71 in reach.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and in the final phase of his career.
items.quote: lost two in a row 38 years old kind of in that final phase

items.claim: Narulo Aliv squeaks by with competitive decision wins and does not do a lot of damage.
items.quote: he goes out there and, you know, he squeaks by with these competitive decision wins every single time. He doesn't do a lot of damage.

items.claim: Narulo Aliv was mounted at the end of his fight by Joe Solecki a year and a half ago.
items.quote: Was mounted, you know, at the end by Joe Selei a year and a half ago.

items.claim: Mike Davis suffered from breathing issues due to newly painted locker rooms during his fight against Fares Ziam.
items.quote: they had just repainted the locker rooms. Mike Davis said he couldn't breathe. So, I'm going to take him at his word. That was not even a best version of Mike Davis.
